AutoPacker Installer Toolkit v1.0.0
===================================

This is a placeholder for the AutoPacker Installer Toolkit executable.

In production, this would be the full installation package containing:
- MSI Builder tool
- MSIX Converter
- PowerShell PSADT Framework
- Intune Win32 App Packager
- Batch Processing Engine

Download started successfully!
File: autopacker-toolkit-v1.0.0.exe
Size: 145 MB
Version: 1.0.0
Release Date: February 15, 2026

System Requirements:
- Windows 10 (v1809 or later)
- Windows 11
- Windows Server 2019+
- 8GB RAM minimum
- 500MB disk space

For installation instructions, visit: /downloads/installer-toolkit-v1

Thank you for downloading AutoPacker!
